description: Letter from Salāma b. Mūsā Safāquṣī (Alexandria) to Nahray b. Nissim (Fustat), ca. 1062. Contains information on the movement of ships, and on a significant damage to one of the ships, causing losses to Nahray. Salāma b. Mūsā Safāquṣī hopes to find out from Nahray b. Nissim prices of oil, flax, pepper. He laments the death of Barhūn b. Mūsā al-Tāhartī. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, p. 450 and Goiteins notes linked below.)
tags: ship, Nahray B. Nissim, movement of ships, flax, prices, al-Tahirti
